How It Works

From upload to professional mix in four simple steps

1

Upload Your Track

Drop your WAV, MP3, or FLAC file. Get instant analysis and see your mix transform in real-time.

2

AI Analysis

Our genre-aware AI identifies your style—trap, R&B, boom bap—and applies the exact techniques used by Grammy-winning engineers.

3

Smart Mixing

Automated EQ, compression, and leveling that makes your tracks sound professional, radio-ready, and competitive on any platform.

4

Export & Download

Download your mixed track in pristine WAV or high-quality MP3. Keep full stems for unlimited creative control.

AI-Powered Features

Studio-Quality Tools

Professional mixing tools powered by cutting-edge AI

NEW

Stem Separation

Extract vocals, drums, bass, and instruments from any track with surgical precision—perfect for remixes, samples, or fixing mix issues.

ACTIVE

AI Smart Mixing

Get radio-ready, competitive mixes in seconds—our AI applies the exact EQ, compression, and balancing used by top engineers on your genre.

ACTIVE
POPULAR

Instant Mastering

Loudness, clarity, and punch that matches commercial releases—optimized for Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, and club systems.

ACTIVE

Before/After

A/B compare your original vs AI mixed version instantly with parallel playback—hear the difference before you commit.

ACTIVE

Vocal Enhancement

Crystal-clear vocals that cut through the mix—auto-tune correction, de-essing, and presence boosting that sounds natural, not processed.

ACTIVE

Reference Matching

Match the sonic signature of your favorite recordings—get that classic vocal warmth or modern drum punch with one click.

ACTIVE
NEW

Reverb & Effects

Professional space and dimension—from intimate room ambience to epic hall reverb, all intelligently matched to your track.

ACTIVE

Batch Processing

Process entire albums or sample packs at once—consistent quality across all tracks with automatic genre detection.

ACTIVE
PRO

Real-time Preview

Hear every adjustment instantly with zero latency—no more waiting for renders to tweak your mix.

ACTIVE
Trusted by 10,000+ Producers

See what producers, engineers, and artists are achieving with AI Mixer Pro

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about AI Mixer Pro

Our AI is trained on thousands of professionally mixed tracks across genres. While it won't replace a human engineer's creative decisions, it provides an excellent starting point that typically requires minimal fine-tuning. Many users report 80-90% time savings compared to manual mixing.
AI Mixer Pro

Professional AI-powered audio mixing for bedroom producers. Bring studio-quality mastering to your music.
